description_for_human: Analyze Shopify stores, research Amazon products, and find Google Maps sales leads. Pay per use with USDC on Base — no signup required.
description_for_model: Intelligence API for e-commerce research. Tools: (1) analyze any Shopify store — products, pricing, theme, apps; (2) search Amazon products with an Opportunity Score that quantifies market gap; (3) get full Amazon product analysis with FBA fee and profit estimates; (4) search Google Maps businesses with a Lead Quality Score; (5) find filtered sales leads with outreach hints. All calls are paid per-use with USDC on Base via the x402 protocol. No API key or account required — just send the x402 payment header.
